backend/main.mo: Motoko backend managing user profiles and multi-chunk pastes with access control, expiration logic, and blob-backed file storage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing download‑filename related features, their affected files, components, tests, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing prewritten one‑sentence summaries for key frontend source files.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base styles defining a warm OKLCH color palette and theme variables for light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point mounting the React app and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Top-level React component implementing hash-based routing and rendering create or view pages within themed layout.
frontend/src/components/AppLayout.tsx: Layout wrapper providing header, footer, navigation, and authentication-aware UI structure.
frontend/src/components/ErrorState.tsx: Component displaying styled error, not-found, or expired states with icons and illustration.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Authentication button handling Internet Identity login/logout with loading and error handling.
frontend/src/config/pasteLimits.ts: Configuration defining the 50MB per-file upload size limit.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook creating an authenticated or anonymous backend actor and refreshing dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and provider for Internet Identity authentication, managing identity state and login/logout flow using AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for creating pastes and fetching paste data, including handling files, text chunks, and expiration info.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS setup defining color variables, theming for light/dark modes, and base styling.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app, wrapping it with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/CreatePastePage.tsx: UI page for creating a new paste with text, files, expiration options, and share link generation.
frontend/src/pages/PasteViewPage.tsx: Displays a shared paste with message and downloadable files, handling expiration and download actions.
frontend/src/utils/fileDownload.ts: Utility functions for mapping MIME types to extensions, generating safe filenames, and downloading ExternalBlob files.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides helpers to get URL parameters, persist them in sessionStorage, and remove them from the hash for routing and state persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind CSS with custom colors, fonts, container settings, animations, and plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project state, requirements, and issues related to fixing file download behavior to preserve original filenames.
